rule.description: Base rule for MikroTik Docker collectors
MikroTik: system identity changed by $(admin_user) via $(method) from $(srcaddr) to $(new_identity)
MikroTik: system time changed from $(old_time) to $(new_time)

rule.match: system time zone settings changed by
rule.description: MikroTik: time zone changed to $(time_zone) by $(admin_user) via $(method)
MikroTik: ppp user $(username) logged in from $(srcaddr) with local ip $(localip)
MikroTik: ppp authentication failed - username:$(username)
MikroTik: ppp user $(username) logged out from $(srcaddr)
MikroTik: Login failure for user $(username) from $(srcaddr) via $(method)
MikroTik: Brute force detected - $(srcaddr) failed login 10 times in 3 minutes
MikroTik: user $(admin_user) logged in from $(srcaddr) via $(method)
MikroTik: user $(admin_user) logged out from $(srcaddr) via $(method)

rule.regex: user \S+ added by|user \S+ changed by|user \S+ removed by
rule.description: MikroTik: user $(target_user) $(action) by $(admin_user) via $(method) from $(srcaddr)
MikroTik: user $(target_user) password changed by $(admin_user)

rule.regex: filter rule added by|filter rule changed by
rule.description: MikroTik: firewall rule $(event_action) | action=$(fw_action) | user=$(admin_user) | srcaddr=$(srcaddr)$(chain:+ | chain=$(chain))
MikroTik: firewall filter rule removed by $(admin_user) via $(method) from $(srcaddr)

rule.regex: filter6 rule added by|filter6 rule changed by
rule.description: MikroTik: ipv6 firewall rule $(event_action) | action=$(fw_action) | user=$(admin_user) | srcaddr=$(srcaddr)$(chain:+ | chain=$(chain))
MikroTik: ipv6 firewall filter rule removed by $(admin_user) via $(method) from $(srcaddr)
MikroTik: ip service $(changed_service) changed by $(admin_user) via $(method) from $(srcaddr)
MikroTik: dns configuration changed by $(admin_user) via $(method) - remote-requests: $(allow_remote_requests),dns-servers: $(dns_servers),doh-server: $(doh_server)
MikroTik: script added by $(admin_user) via $(method) from $(srcaddr) - script name: $(script_name) , source code: $(source_code)
MikroTik: scheduler script added by $(admin_user) from $(srcaddr) (name=$(name), disabled=$(disabled), start=$(start_date) $(start_time))
MikroTik: ppp secret added by $(admin_user) via $(method) from $(srcaddr) (ppp_user=$(ppp_user))
